auth.heroText: Plan trainings and matches at Sportpark Jabbeke, check pitch and dressing-room availability, pick your matchday squad, and keep every player and staff member in sync.
auth.signInPrompt: Sign in to your KSV Jabbeke account to continue.
auth.accountsByAdmin: Accounts are created by your club administrator.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's coming up across your club.
dashboard.emptyManage: Schedule your first training or match to get started.
dashboard.emptyPlayer: When your trainer schedules activities, they'll appear here.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: All trainings, matches, meetings and events.

teams.title: Teams
teams.emptyAdmin: Create your first team, then add trainers and players to it.
teams.emptyMember: You're not assigned to a team yet. Your administrator can add you.

teamDetail.feedersDesc: Players from these teams can be selected for {{team}}'s matches.
teamDetail.dressingRoomsDesc: Reserved automatically for home trainings and matches (trainers don't pick them). For a home match the opponent also gets a free room.
teamDetail.dressingRoomsNone: No dressing rooms defined yet. Add some under Facilities.

addMember.title: Add member
addMember.noPeople: No available people. Create a new account instead.
addMember.shownOnce: This password is shown once. The member should change it after first sign-in.

activityForm.title: Schedule activity
activityForm.locationDerivedEmpty: Select a pitch or room that has an address to set the location.
activityForm.locationAutoHint: The location is taken from the reserved facilities.
activityForm.autoRoomsHint: Dressing rooms are assigned automatically from the team's rooms.
activityForm.autoRoomsMatchHint: Dressing rooms are assigned automatically — the team's rooms plus a free room for the opponent.
activityForm.noFacilities: No facilities defined yet (an admin can add pitches and rooms).
activityForm.errTimes: End time must be after start time

recurrence.errCount: Please enter a number of occurrences
recurrence.skippedTitle: {{count}} session(s) skipped due to booking conflicts

activityDetail.confirmCancel: Cancel this activity? Members will be notified.
activityDetail.emptyTitle: No players in this team yet
activityDetail.emptyDesc: Add players to the team to track availability.
activityDetail.youAreSelected: You are selected for the squad
activityDetail.callupNoneLeft: All feeder players are already called up
activityDetail.callupEmpty: No call-ups yet — search above to add players from feeder teams.
activityDetail.seriesPrompt: This activity is part of a recurring series.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Team channels and one-to-one conversations.
messages.selectPrompt: Select a team channel or a person to start chatting.
messages.teamChannelSub: Team channel · everyone in this team
messages.teamEmpty: No messages yet. Say hello to your team 👋
messages.directEmpty: This is the start of your conversation with {{name}}.
messages.noTeamChatDesc: You'll be able to chat once you're part of a team.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pushBlocked: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.

admin.overviewSubtitle: Manage teams, people and facilities for KSV Jabbeke.
admin.noTeams: No teams yet. Create your first team to get started.

people.title: People
people.subtitle: Create and manage trainer, player and admin accounts.
people.emptyDesc: Create accounts for your trainers and players to get started.
people.shownOnceShort: Shown once only. Ask the member to change it after first sign-in.
people.createHint: A temporary password is generated automatically and shown once.
people.playerNeedsTeam: A player must be assigned to a team.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.subtitle: Pitches, dressing rooms and meeting rooms you can reserve for activities.
facilities.emptyDesc: Add pitches and rooms so trainers can reserve them and avoid double-bookings.
facilities.name: Name

subscribe.title: Subscribe to your agenda
subscribe.intro: Add this calendar to your phone or computer. It updates automatically when activities change.
subscribe.autoUpdate: Your calendar app refreshes this automatically (usually within a day).
subscribe.resetConfirm: Reset your calendar link? The old URL will stop working.

performance.rateIntro: Give each player up to 5 stars for performance and mentality. Optional — rate whoever you want.
performance.notePlaceholder: Optional private note (coaching staff only — not visible to the player)
performance.subtitle: Performance over time
performance.teamSummaryDesc: Average trainer ratings per player. Tap a name for details.
performance.overviewSubtitle: Average trainer ratings and trends per player, over the season.
performance.noTeams: You don't coach any teams yet.

geo.notFound: Address not found — pick a suggestion or check the spelling.
